title: lyonia foliosa
intro: Lyonia foliosa, also known as the frostweed or green-fruited lyonia, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of tannins and other bioactive compounds. Consuming the leaves of the lyonia foliosa plant may help alleviate symptoms of colds and sore throats, while also providing antioxidant and antimicrobial benefits. Herbal preparations of lyonia foliosa are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
